name: zerogpt-codex-plugin
description: Check text with ZeroGPT from Codex using a Playwright-powered CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Check AI likelihood and detected lines with ZeroGPT.
interface.longDescription: ZeroGPT Checker adds a Codex skill backed by a local Playwright CLI. It can run compact score-only checks or return detected line snippets mapped back to the original input.
defaultPrompt: Run ZeroGPT and show detected lines.
Give me a compact ZeroGPT score.
